# COLE Products — Complete List
# Auto-generated from taxchecknow/cole/config/
# Last updated: [run generator to update]

## HOW TO REGENERATE THIS FILE

In Claude Code Session A (taxchecknow folder):
```
Read all files in cole/config/ directory.
For each product config, extract:
  - product_key
  - name (from productName or h1)
  - fear_number (first dollar/pound/percent amount in answerBody[0])
  - url (constructed from productId and market)
  - authority (from lawBarBadges[0])
  - country (from market field)
  - character (Gary/James/Tyler/Aroha/Fraser/Priya)
  - related_products (from routing links)

Write to cole-marketing/PRODUCTS.md in this format.
```
